page.title: Complex Noun Phrases
page.subtitle_html: Complex Noun Phrases - C2 noun groups with dense premodification, postmodification, apposition, and embedded clauses.
page.subtitle_text: C2 noun groups with dense premodification, postmodification, apposition, and embedded clauses.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Complex noun phrases: compact C2 anchors for dense noun groups in formal and academic English.","rules":[{"label":"Premodification","text":"Build meaning before the head noun with adjectives, nouns, and participles.","example":"The sharp increase in energy prices affected small businesses."},{"label":"Postmodification","text":"Add precision after the head noun with prepositional phrases, infinitives, and clauses.","example":"The question of how to fund the programme remains unresolved."},{"label":"Information density","text":"Use complex noun phrases to package abstract ideas without creating long chains of finite clauses.","example":"The rapid expansion of urban infrastructure created new risks."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the Polyglot English C2 lesson on complex noun phrases.
